author: 艣r墨la r奴pa gosv膩m墨
verses:
jamal膩rjuna鈰卋ha帽janam 膩艣rita鈰卹a帽janam ahiga帽jana鈰単hana鈰卨膩sya鈰卋hara峁乗npa艣up膩la鈰卲urandaram abhis峁泃a鈰卥andaram atisundaram aravinda鈰卥aram
vara鈰単opa鈰卾adh奴鈰卝ana鈰卾iracita鈰卲奴janam uru鈰卥奴jana鈰卬ava鈰卾e峁噓鈰卍hara峁乗nsmara鈰卬arma鈰卾icak峁峁嘺m akhila鈰卾ilak峁峁嘺鈰卼anu鈰卨ak峁峁嘺m atidak峁taram

pra峁嘺t膩艣ani鈰卲a帽jaram namvara鈰卲i帽jaram ariku帽jara鈰卙arim indumukha峁乗ngo鈰卪a峁囜笉ala鈰卹ak峁峁嘺m anuk峁泃a鈰卲ak峁峁嘺m atidak峁峁嘺m amit膩tma鈰卻ukham
guru鈰単airika鈰卪a峁囜笉itam anunaya鈰卲a峁囜笉itam avakha峁囜笉ita鈰卲uruh奴ta鈰卪akha峁乗nvraja鈰卥amala鈰卾irocanam alika鈰卻urocana鈰単orocanam atit膩mra鈰卬akham

unmada鈰卹ati鈰卬膩yaka鈰吪浤佱箛ita鈰卻膩yaka鈰卾inidh膩yaka鈰卌ala鈰卌illi鈰卨atam
uddhata鈰卻a峁卥ocanam ambuja鈰卨ocanam agha鈰卪ocanam amar膩li鈰卬atam
nikhil膩dhika鈰単auravam ujjvala鈰卻aurabham atigaurabha鈰卲a艣up墨峁 rata峁乗nm峁沝u鈰卲ada鈰卲allavam abhram u vallabha鈰卹uci鈰卍urlabha鈰卻a鈰卾il膩sa鈰単atam

bhuja鈰卪奴rdhni vi艣a峁卥a峁璦m adhigata鈰吪沘峁卥a峁璦鈰卬ata鈰卥a峁卥a峁璦m a峁璦v墨峁 cala峁乗nnavan墨pa鈰卥arambita鈰卾ana鈰卹olambitam avalambita鈰卥ala鈰卥a峁囜弓ha鈰卥alam
durjana鈰卼峁涐箛a鈰卲膩vakam anucara鈰吪浤乿aka鈰卬ikar膩vakam aru峁噊峁ａ弓ha鈰卍ala峁乗nnija鈰卾ikrama鈰卌arcita鈰卋huja鈰単uru鈰単arvita鈰単andharvita鈰卍anuj膩rdi鈰卋alam

艣ruti鈰卹atna鈰卾ibh奴峁峁嘺鈰卹uci鈰卝ita鈰卲奴峁峁嘺m alid奴峁峁嘺鈰卬ayan膩nta鈰単ati峁乗njamun膩鈰卼a峁璦鈰卼alpita鈰卲u峁am analpita鈰卪ada鈰卝alpita鈰卍ayit膩pta鈰卹atim
vandemahi vandita鈰卬andam amandita鈰卥ulam andhita鈰卥hala鈰卥a峁乻a鈰卪ati峁乗ntv膩m iha d膩modara haladhara鈰卻odara hara no daram anubaddha鈰卹atim
en_translation:
Breaker of the twin Arjuna trees, You delight those who take shelter of You. Your heavy dancing shames the dark clouds. You are the best among the protectors of the cowherds; approaching the caves, You are exceedingly beautiful, with lotus-like hands. Worshiped by excellent cowherd girls and holding a new flute with abundant sweet sounds, You are an expert in amorous pastimes and possess all extraordinary bodily characteristics.

You are a fortress for the surrendered, wearing yellow garments鈥攁 lion to Your elephant-like enemies, with a moon-like face. Protector of the cowherd community, imitating the birds, You are very benevolent and possess unlimited inner happiness. Adorned with red chalk and expert in persuasion, You thwarted Indra's sacrifice. You illuminate the lotus of V峁沶d膩vana with an excellent vermilion mark and exceedingly reddish nails.

Your moving, creeper-like eyebrows set the sharpened arrows of the god of intoxicated love in motion. Humbling the arrogant, with lotus-like eyes, You are the liberator from sins, bowed to by hosts of demigods. You possess supreme glory and a brilliant fragrance, greatly delighting in the cowherd girls. With tender sprout-like feet, Your playful gait and dark beauty are difficult to attain even by the desires of Your most beloved devotees.

With broad shoulders and strong arms adorned with captivating bracelets, You move through the forests. Playing amidst forests intertwined with fresh kadamba flowers and surrounded by buzzing bees, Your sweet voice is echoed by the sweet-throated birds. You are a fire to the grass-like wicked and the protector of Your young followers, with reddish petal-like lips. Your arms are anointed with Your own valor, and Your strength torments the proud demons.

Adorned with the jewels of the Vedas, Your splendor conquers the sun-god, and Your sidelong glances shame the bees. Your beloveds attain deep love through Your intoxicating words, and flowers are spread for You on the banks of the Yamun膩. We worship You, who are worshiped by Nanda, whose family is glorious, and who blinded the intelligence of the wicked king Ka峁乻a. O D膩modara, brother of Balar膩ma, remove our fear and grant us constant devotion.
